title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Puma India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Puma India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Puma India! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Puma India:
Puma India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puma India!
